channel.title: Ai on Sergio Méndez Website
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on Sergio Méndez Website

item.title: Presenter, ChatLoopBackOff Episode 75: Exploring Trulens with Shivay Lamba, CNCF, Online
item.description:
In this I presented Shivay in the CNCF show “ChatLoopBackOff Episode 75: Exploring Trulens with Shivay Lamba”

I participated as presenter in this CNCF Show.

Event

item.title: AI, Cloud Native and Kubernetes, Cloud Native Guatemala, Online
item.description:
In this online talk, Sergio Méndez, Edgar Alvarez, and José Lorenzana will discuss how cloud-native technologies like Kubernetes are being used for artificial intelligence applications. During the talk, we’ll explore the CNCF landscape in the field of artificial intelligence.

I hosted and participated as presenter. Event
